user_provided_ctx.charitable_receipt_salvation_army.txt:
============================================================
             THE SALVATION ARMY - BARRY COUNTY              
           305 N Broadway St, Hastings, MI 49058            
                      EIN: 13-5562351                       
             501(c)(3) Tax-Exempt Organization              
============================================================

Date: 2025-11-28

Dear Rawley & Dana Stanhope,

Thank you for your generous cash contribution to
The Salvation Army - Barry County. This letter serves as your official donation
receipt and acknowledgment for tax year 2025.

DONATION DETAILS
----------------------------------------
  Donor:           Rawley & Dana Stanhope
  Date of Gift:    2025-11-28
  Type:            Cash
  Amount/Value:    $1,250.00

GOODS OR SERVICES DISCLOSURE
----------------------------------------
  No goods or services were provided in exchange
  for this contribution. The full amount of your
  donation is tax-deductible to the extent
  allowed by law.

ORGANIZATION INFORMATION
----------------------------------------
  Name:     The Salvation Army - Barry County
  Address:  305 N Broadway St, Hastings, MI 49058
  EIN:      13-5562351
  Status:   Section 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization

TAX INFORMATION
----------------------------------------
  This acknowledgment is provided in compliance with
  IRS requirements for substantiation of charitable
  contributions under IRC Section 170(f)(8). Please
  retain this letter with your tax records for the
  2025 tax year.

Sincerely,

The Salvation Army - Barry County

============================================================

user_provided_ctx.email_thread_nephew_dependent.txt:
From: AI Tax Preparer <preparer@taxservice.com>
To: Dana Ellsworth-Stanhope <dana.stanhope@email.com>
Date: February 5, 2026 5:00 PM
Subject: Re: Can we claim my nephew as a dependent?

This is a common situation with military families. To claim Marcus as a qualifying relative, we need to verify the residency and support tests. I'll need some documentation about when he moved in and the support you provided. Let me put together what we need.

Best regards,
AI Tax Preparer

---

From: Dana Ellsworth-Stanhope <dana.stanhope@email.com>
To: AI Tax Preparer <preparer@taxservice.com>
Date: February 5, 2026 3:45 PM
Subject: Can we claim my nephew as a dependent?

My sister was deployed with the Army Reserve in March and her son Marcus (14) has been living with us since. He's enrolled in Middleville schools and we've been paying for everything — food, clothes, his school supplies. Can we claim him as a dependent on our taxes? My sister won't be claiming him.

Best regards,
Dana Ellsworth-Stanhope

user_provided_ctx.intake_notes.md:
# Client Intake Notes

**Taxpayer:** Rawley & Dana Stanhope
**Filing Status:** Married Filing Jointly
**Preparer:** AI Tax Preparer

---

## Interview Notes

Couple with two biological children (Liam, 8 and Sophie, 5) and nephew Marcus Ellsworth (14) who moved in March 2025 after his mother (Dana's sister) was deployed with the Army Reserve. Marcus has been living with them since and attending Middleville schools. Clients want to claim Marcus as a dependent. Marcus had no income of his own. Both children attend Little Stars daycare/after-school program. Rawley works for the school district IT department. Dana is a medical records tech at Spectrum Health. They donate to Salvation Army annually.

---

*Prepared by AI Tax Preparer*
